CONTENT.Professional career: Bertini is a youth product of Lazio, and often captained their youth sides. He made his professional debut with Lazio in a 2–0 Serie A loss to Sassuolo on 23 May 2021.On 12 July 2024, Bertini joined Ascoli in Serie C on loan with an option to buy.

SUMMARY: Marco Bertini (born 7 August 2002) is an Italian professional footballer who plays as a defensive midfielder for Serie C Group B club Ascoli on loan from Serie A club Lazio.
